It belongs to the genus Miconia, which is a large and diverse group of plants found in the tropical regions of the world. The family Melastomataceae is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the "membracine families" or "melastome families". As a member of this family, Miconia leafoveolata shares these characteristics and is found in its native range.
